dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
browse products, add to cart, and buy them
Do users need login or authentication?
it should be fast, like under 2 seconds

functional: The system shall allow customers to browse products.
The system shall allow customers to add products to a cart.
The system shall allow customers to purchase products.
The system shall provide an admin role.
non_functional: The system shall respond within 2 seconds.
The system shall encrypt stored user passwords.
